testcase.name: testGinCategory

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.xpath: //a[normalize-space()='Gin'] to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//a[normalize-space()='Gin']"}.
